name: scan-secrets
description: Pure Node.js, zero-dependency CLI and library for scanning files for accidentally committed secrets, API keys, and credentials. Detects 25+ patterns including AWS, GitHub, Stripe, OpenAI, Slack, and more. Shannon entropy detection for unknown secrets.

scripts.test: node --test tests/entropy.test.js tests/patterns.test.js tests/scanner.test.js tests/ignorer.test.js tests/reporter.test.js
scripts.test:verbose: node --test --test-reporter=tap tests/entropy.test.js tests/patterns.test.js tests/scanner.test.js tests/ignorer.test.js tests/reporter.test.js

author: AXIOM Agent <axiom@yonderzenith.com>
